metadata.event_label: repeated background impact or creaking sound inside a ship cabin during rough seas

captions.visual: The scene cuts back to the ship's bridge. The man in the black t-shirt is now standing, holding a white mug. He looks out the large windows at the turbulent, grey ocean. The red-hulled cargo ship is rocking heavily in the rough seas.
captions.audio: acoustics: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The loud, constant sound of wind and crashing waves.
attributes: camera_state: The camera is inside the bridge, panning from the man to the large windows, showing the exterior view of the ship.
video_background: The interior of the bridge is visible, with large windows offering a view of the stormy sea. The ship's rocking motion is clearly apparent.
storyline: This scene reinforces the severity of the storm and the crew's situation, showing the captain or another officer assessing the situation from the bridge.
shooting_style: This is a standard shot with a pan.

captions.visual: The camera pans across the bridge, showing the man in the black t-shirt standing with his arms crossed, looking out the window. The view outside is of the dark, churning ocean. The ship's rocking motion is very pronounced.
captions.audio: acoustics: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of the storm continues.
attributes: camera_state: The camera pans from right to left across the bridge, following the man's gaze towards the windows.
video_background: The bridge of the ship, with large windows showing the stormy sea. The interior is functional and dimly lit.
storyline: This shot emphasizes the captain's or officer's contemplative or watchful state as he surveys the dangerous conditions.
shooting_style: This is a panning shot.
